name: Improper Neutralization of Invalid Characters in Identifiers in Web Pages
description: The product does not properly remove invalid characters or null bytes within tag names and URI schemes (e.g., 'java%00script:'), allowing attackers to bypass XSS filters because browsers may still interpret the malformed identifier as executable code.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides input with null bytes or invalid characters embedded in script identifiers that bypasses CONTROL[xss_filter] pattern matching, but the browser strips the invalid characters and executes the script at EGRESS[html_output]
